message.text: Here all on your lonesome, wiggling away
I got an exam in the morning so I should be studying.......
oh, outfit glitched for a second there
They reduced the amount of API calls
Anything that makes a call to Spotify is borkked
If you can, adjust the call delay / interval to 10 seconds or more
Yeah every app is hitting the call limit super fast
or what they call em... "Father I have sinned" yada yada
Here's my confession: This is my most hated song of all time :<
my toaster's still hanging in there
I need to study so imma lurk a bit, if I can resist yapping
Then just full-on wiggling for a quick break even
imma make you and Selene (the DJ) collab the moment both of you sort your hardware issues xD
shes struggling with crashing / lagging VRC too
even the song goes on about flashing
WATCHING YOU IS VERY DISTRACTING xdD
save me from this flashing temptress
idk I think it could be a good dancing song
Only dance move I do is the bus driver
You make it work~ but maybe not the ideal song for dance hmhm
that you don't get from diet coke
oh one more idea, but, soon xD don't wanna spam
Tho tbh not sure how it's meant to be pronounced
Also Diamond Hard from Kerli you might like
I feel like requesting Jump from Blackpink to see if you can keep up with it
Oh yeah Selene plays a lot of 90s Eurodance and dnb v:
can I say a weird thing
and I would never go against TOS, the accusation, gasp. I'm well behaved and mostly harmless.

wanted to say, if it's not weird or insulting, that your voice is very pleasant to listen to? I'm very much about music and sounds and everything so it's just... Something I really appreciate, and noticed.
You also need some transition animations and screens v: could be like one where you're dancing or sitting in that penthouse world and looking at the stars, or something such
voice is about the same volume for me as before
now we can't make you shut up
Yeah but you could record a looping video in VRC and slap a BRB or Stream Starting text on top in OBS
Never been here early enough to see xD looked good tho
Yeah I need a mic for my headset... If I ever get it back
I wonder if a throat mic would work xD
No like one of those that picks up your voice through your throat
I can't draw for shit anymore
Had a phase when younger, drawing furry stuff for money, definitely would've been against TOS
ah shit I might need to sleep, dozing off. damn time difference
gonna stay on stream and sleep
Don't raid some super loud streamer ok? Dx
will check it in the morning ~
